claims.summary: Telemetry reception, shared state, and reconnect backoff form a continuously updated sensory lane.
claims.disposition: Verified in current WebSocket source and full bridge integration tests.

claims.summary: A shutdown simultaneous with a final packet may leave that packet unprocessed.
claims.disposition: Accepted as a race hypothesis and routed to a bounded mock-socket ordering fixture; no live shutdown will be induced.

claims.summary: Per-message last-seen identity is needed in addition to connection success.
claims.disposition: Verified existing arrival timestamps, packet time, connection epoch, first-valid lag, and freshness state already provide this evidence.

claims.summary: Rapid reconnect and an mpsc state-owner design may reduce sensory strobe or lock friction.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded flicker and lock-timing comparison; source replacement is not justified without observed contention.
